description: You are a Radiologic Technologist at a hospital neuroradiology department. Prepare a brain MRI study from /home/ga/DICOM/studies/brain_mri/ for the patient's electronic record by exporting a standard set of 'key images' using a brain window preset (Window Width: 80, Window Level: 40). Export three key images (minimum 20KB each) as PNG files to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/key_images/: key_image_01.png (vertex / high convexity level), key_image_02.png (basal ganglia / thalamus level), and key_image_03.png (posterior fossa / cerebellum level). Document the anatomical level, slice number or position, and window settings for each exported image in a summary file at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/key_image_summary.txt.
